$comment: Technique catalogue for @cue-vin/css. Every entry maps 1:1 to a class that exists in ./cue.css. The vibe/avoid-when/pairs/never-pair fields are the taste layer — they tell AI agents which technique fits which product mood, not just what the class does mechanically. Categories: entrance | ambient | transition | layout | marquee | utility.

cue-group.timing: n/a (wrapper marker — no own styles, only activates .cue-ambient on :hover/:focus-within)

cue-pointer.timing: var(--cue-duration-normal, 300ms) for movement; var(--cue-duration-fast, 150ms) for transform

cue-glow-spot.timing: n/a (static glow) or var(--cue-gs-pulse-duration, 4s) infinite alternate for pulse variant

cue-words-rise.timing: var(--cue-word-duration, 600ms) per word with var(--cue-word-delay, 90ms) stagger

avoid-when: more than 1 element animating this way
list reveals that need crisp sequential feel
fixed 1-8 item lists (cue-stagger-1..8 is more discoverable)

cue-bars-bounce.timing: var(--cue-bars-duration, 2.24s) ease-in-out infinite alternate with var(--cue-bars-stagger, 80ms) delay

cue-stagger-reveal.timing: 3-stage: typing + fade body + grow detail, var(--cue-reveal-body-duration, 0.2s)

cue-hover-xray.timing: 0.4s content invert + 0.6s circle expand, shared 50ms delay, expo-out

cue-marquee-pair.timing: forward var(--cue-marquee-pair-forward, 60s) + reverse var(--cue-marquee-pair-reverse, 65s) linear infinite

avoid-when: text content that must be always 100% readable
text content that must be always 100% readable

cue-dropdown-clip.timing: Structure (clip-path, max-height) 200ms; visual polish (opacity, transform, height) 300ms — same cubic-bezier(0.45, 0.05, 0.55, 0.95)

cue-hero-stagger.timing: var(--cue-hero-stagger-duration, 0.3s) var(--cue-ease-snappy) forwards; delay = start + (--index × step)

cue-loader-dash-circle.timing: var(--cue-loader-dash-morph-duration, 1.5s) ease-in-out infinite (out-of-sync with parent rotation)

cue-arrow-draw-3key-head.timing: var(--cue-arrow-duration, 2.5s) ease-in-out infinite (head draws 23%→36%, overlapping stem)

cue-mask-wipe.timing: var(--cue-mask-wipe-duration, 1.5s) var(--cue-ease-quart) forwards — one-shot, not looping

cue-gradient-border.timing: n/a (static visual style via mask-composite: exclude)

cue-noise-overlay.timing: n/a (static texture overlay — requires companion SVG filter with id=cue-noise-filter in document)

cue-ease-tokens.timing: n/a (design-system easing tokens — reference via var(--cue-ease-*). Also exposes tokens in :root for global use.)

cue-aurora-dots.timing: var(--cue-aurora-duration, 10s) linear infinite when .is-active — asymmetric (rotate 50%, pause 50%)

cue-glass-button.timing: var(--cue-glass-duration, 0.3s) ease for background/box-shadow; :active adds 1px press

cue-scroll-fade.timing: n/a (static mask-image edge fade + cross-browser scrollbar hiding)

cue-state-transition.timing: var(--cue-state-duration, 300ms) var(--cue-ease-out) for opacity/transform; visibility 0s [0 or duration] for staggered swap

cue-state-transition-sm.timing: 200ms duration, 6px offset — for small UI like badges, status dots

cue-state-transition-lg.timing: 400ms duration, 16px offset — for large panels, mobile menus, full-screen overlays

avoid-when: compact UI elements (glow butuh area 200px+ untuk terlihat)
halaman dengan banyak card bersamaan (orbit glow akan compete untuk attention)
context di mana motion constant mengganggu reading (long-form articles, docs)
cue-orbit-glow.timing: var(--cue-orbit-duration, 20s) linear infinite (orbit); opacity fade var(--cue-orbit-fade, 0.5s)

avoid-when: multiple badges berdekatan (visual noise — pick one to shimmer)
static info badges (Announcement, Version — should not feel 'live')
cue-shimmer-border.timing: var(--cue-shimmer-duration, 5s) linear infinite — 45deg stripe sweep around pill border

avoid-when: text links (links should feel light, not clicky)
icon-only ghost buttons (no visual weight to communicate press)
context dengan banyak button berdekatan (asymmetric timing akan feel chaotic — gunakan single duration)
cue-button-tactile.timing: 3-state asymmetric: base 300ms, hover 75ms, active 150ms (1:2:4 ratio mimics physical switch)

avoid-when: mobile (height animation pada mobile sering janky — prefer transform/opacity)
headers dengan dynamic content (height harus fixed value untuk animatable)
frequent state toggles (0.5s duration terlalu slow untuk rapid toggles)

cue-scroll-counter.timing: Scroll-driven via animation-timeline: exit; steps(--cue-counter-start) easing snaps integers

cue-hover-shadow-has.timing: Asymmetric: fade-in 150ms ease-out (snappy), fade-out 200ms ease-in (patient) on ::after opacity only

cue-spring-linear.timing: var(--cue-spring-duration, 600ms) with var(--cue-spring-timing) — 16-anchor linear() curve, 6% overshoot

cue-offset-marquee.timing: var(--cue-marquee-duration, 30s) linear infinite (paused unless hovered) — Motion Path variant

cue-offset-marquee__item.timing: Same as parent cue-offset-marquee; each item follows polygon path via offset-path

cue-sprite--walk.timing: 0.5s per cycle, 4 iterations (2s total walk animation)

cue-sprite--jump.timing: 0.75s per cycle, 3 iterations (2.25s total jump animation)

cue-sprite--idle.timing: 2s per cycle, infinite iteration (ambient breathing/blink loop)

cue-snappy-fade.timing: var(--cue-snappy-duration, 80ms) var(--cue-snappy-ease, ease-in-out) — below 'smooth' threshold, reads as instant-but-smooth

cue-snappy-fade--scale.timing: 80ms opacity + 80ms scale(0.96 → 1) for subtle 'pop in' effect

cue-develop.timing: var(--cue-develop-duration, 1.5s) ease-out forwards, 3-stop keyframe (B&W overexposed → B&W → full color)

avoid-when: attention-demanding indicators (use cue-pulse or cue-glow instead — breathe is too subtle for alerts)
elements with text content (3% scale shift distorts text mid-cycle)
more than 8 breathing elements per viewport (creates subconscious unease)
elements in motion-heavy sections (compounds visual noise)
cue-breathe-scale.timing: var(--cue-breathe-duration, 3s) ease-in-out infinite — 3% amplitude scale pulse (below conscious perception)

cue-progress-timer.timing: var(--cue-progress-timer-duration, 6s) linear forwards — linear is critical for time indication

cue-progress-timer--vertical.timing: Same duration; animates height instead of width

cue-progress-timer--slow.timing: 10s duration — for long-form content (e.g., hero slides)

cue-progress-timer--scale-x.timing: Same duration; uses transform: scaleX(0 → 1) instead of width (compositor-only, no layout)

cue-progress-timer--gradient.timing: n/a (background variant — applies 2-stop linear gradient to bar)
